ci_support_linux_64_python3.10.____cpyth:
c_compiler:
- gcc
c_compiler_version:
- '14'
c_stdlib:
- sysroot
c_stdlib_version:
- '2.17'
channel_sources:
- conda-forge
channel_targets:
- conda-forge main
docker_image:
- quay.io/condaforge/linux-anvil-x86_64:alma9
pin_run_as_build:
  python:
    min_pin: x.x
    max_pin: x.x
python:
- 3.10.* *_cpython
target_platform:
- linux-64

about.summary: DAQP: A dual active-set QP solver
DAQP: A dual active-set QP solver
DAQP: A dual active-set QP solver

name: daqp

about.summary: DAQP: A dual active-set QP solver
DAQP: A dual active-set QP solver

raw_meta_yaml:
schema_version: 1

context:
  version: "0.8.3"

package:
  name: daqp
  version: ${{ version }}

source:
  url: https://pypi.org/packages/source/d/daqp/daqp-${{ version }}.tar.gz
  sha256: 8729689f724301568b0ea378b91aa6fe957bcf5ee4b055ffd4a99d404ed71d66

build:
  number: 0
  script: ${{ PYTHON }} -m pip install . -vv --no-deps --no-build-isolation

requirements:
  build:
    - if: build_platform != target_platform
      then:
        - python
        - cross-python_${{ target_platform }}
        - cython
    - ${{ compiler('c') }}
    - ${{ stdlib('c') }}
  host:
    - python
    - cython
    - setuptools
    - pip
  run:
    - python
    - numpy

tests:
  - python:
      imports:
        - daqp
  - requirements:
      run:
        - pip
        - python
    script:
      - pip check

about:
  summary: "DAQP: A dual active-set QP solver"
  license: MIT
  license_file: LICENSE
  homepage: http://github.com/darnstrom/daqp

extra:
  recipe-maintainers:
    - darnstrom
    - flferretti

about.summary: DAQP: A dual active-set QP solver
